problem: What causes normal proteins to misfold into prions and spread through tissue?
mechanism: Optogenetic control of specific neuron populations
hypothesis: Optogenetic control of specific neuron populations may resolve What causes normal proteins to misfold into prions and spread through tissue? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 8 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
